lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several large dents. The interior shows heavy wear with torn upholstery and stains. Mechanically, the engine requires a major overhaul and there are known issues with the transmission.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine runs but idles roughly, and the transmission exhibits clear signs of slipping. The body has noticeable rust on the rocker panels and several large dents. The interior is heavily worn with multiple tears in the upholstery. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited as a parts car or a major restoration project for an experienced mechanic.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor surface scratches but is free of significant dents. The interior is clean with light wear on the upholstery. All mechanical systems are functioning properly.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows its age with noticeable rust on the panels, several large dents, and paint that is heavily faded and peeling. Inside, the upholstery is severely worn with multiple tears, and several interior trim pieces are missing or broken. Mechanically, while the engine does start, it has a persistent knock, the transmission shifts harshly, and there are multiple fluid leaks that need to be addressed. This car is being sold as-is and would be best suited as a project vehicle or for parts salvage, as it is not currently reliable for daily use.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project seekers! This vehicle is looking for its next adventure and a bit of love to get it back on the road. It shows its history with significant wear and will require some mechanical and cosmetic repairs, making it an absolute bargain for someone handy. Grab this diamond in the rough and make it your own project today!

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a comprehensive service history and robust mechanical integrity, it offers an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. The interior and exterior remain in commendable condition, reflecting a high standard of previous ownership. Secure a sophisticated driving experience with this well-preserved example.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and she's been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape, super dependable, and honestly looks great parked in the driveway. I've taken good care of it, and it's ready for many more miles of adventures with a new owner. Swing by and take a look—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a purist-spec driver, featuring the high-revving S54B32 power plant with its signature individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission offers precise engagement, paired with a factory-equipped M-Variable differential lock for optimal power delivery. Significant preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a reinforced rear subframe carrier and updated rod bearings to ensure long-term mechanical integrity. The suspension retains its sharp handling characteristics with refreshed bushings and dampers, while the cross-drilled rotors provide consistent thermal management. Though showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its mileage, the powertrain remains robust, delivering

This E92 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and 8,400 RPM redline. The chassis remains exceptionally balanced, equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and the M Variable Differential Lock for precise lateral dynamics. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed manual transmission, offering tactile mechanical engagement. Recent preventative maintenance includes updated rod bearings and throttle actuators, ensuring the internal reciprocating assembly remains within factory tolerances. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with spirited use, the vehicle is mechanically robust with a rigid subframe and a healthy torque curve, making it a prime candidate for the discerning enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained. No mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and everyday utility. The exterior features a deep, consistent finish with only the slightest signs of road wear, while the interior remains a sanctuary of comfort with well-preserved upholstery and fully operational climate and entertainment systems. Under the hood, the engine runs strong and smooth, backed by a consistent history of routine maintenance and professional care. It handles beautifully on both city streets and highways, offering a quiet, confident driving experience. Ready for its next owner, this car represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality pre-owned vehicle that has been looked after with a genuine eye for detail.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and long-term reliability, this selection provides an optimal balance of luxury and value.
